text: "Flynn Rider stands in a forest, eyes on a cliff's tower. He shoots an arrow and starts climbing."
original_texts: Flynn Rider stands in a lush, green forest, looking up at a tall, rocky cliff with a waterfall cascading down.
A tall tower with a pointed roof appears at the top of the cliff, surrounded by greenery.
Flynn Rider turns his head slightly, observing the tower with curiosity.
Flynn Rider looks back at the tower, appearing thoughtful and slightly apprehensive.
Flynn Rider begins to approach the cliff, preparing to climb towards the tower.
Flynn Rider uses an arrow with a rope attached to start climbing the rocky surface.
Flynn Rider grips the arrow tightly, looking determined as he scales the cliff.

text: "Ivy tower with balcony."
original_texts: A tall, ivy-covered tower stands against a bright blue sky with fluffy clouds. The tower has a wooden balcony and a conical roof.

text: Flynn Rider climbs into the sunlit tower, inspects a satchel, and talks to himself. Rapunzel appears behind him, surprised, holding a frying pan. The camera reveals colorful murals inside the tower.
original_texts: A window with sunlight streaming in reveals a view of the outside.
Flynn Rider climbs through the window into the tower.
Flynn Rider stands up inside the tower, looking around.
Flynn leans against the wall, sliding down to sit.
Flynn examines a satchel he is holding, looking pleased.
Flynn continues to look inside the satchel with a satisfied expression.
Flynn smiles and appears to be talking to himself.
Rapunzel appears behind Flynn, holding a frying pan defensively.
Rapunzel looks surprised and cautious, holding the frying pan up.
The camera pans to show the interior of the tower, decorated with colorful murals.

text: "Flynn unconscious, pan nearby."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor of the tower, with his arms and legs sprawled out. A frying pan is on the ground nearby.

text: "Rapunzel nervously peeks at unconscious Flynn on the floor, frying pan beside him."
original_texts: Rapunzel peeks nervously over the top of a dress form, holding it tightly.
Flynn Rider lies unconscious on the floor, with a frying pan nearby.
Rapunzel cautiously moves closer to Flynn, still holding the dress form.
Rapunzel looks worried as she examines Flynn, her long hair trailing behind her.
Rapunzel appears conflicted, glancing between Flynn and the dress form.

text: "Flynn down, teal coat, pan up."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor with his face down, wearing a teal jacket.
A cast iron frying pan is held above Flynn Rider's head, indicating he has been struck.

text: "Rapunzel, surprised, grips pan."
original_texts: Rapunzel, with long blonde hair and wearing a purple dress, looks down with a concerned expression.
Rapunzel grips a frying pan, appearing worried as she glances at Flynn Rider.
Rapunzel's expression changes to surprise as she continues to hold the frying pan.

text: "Chameleon looks up; Rapunzel, worried, holds pan."
original_texts: A green chameleon with large eyes stands on the floor, looking up.
Rapunzel, with long blonde hair and wearing a purple dress, looks worriedly at something off-screen.
Rapunzel holds a frying pan in her hands, appearing thoughtful.

text: "Flynn is out cold; Rapunzel holds a frying pan."
original_texts: Flynn Rider lies unconscious on the floor, face down.
Rapunzel holds a frying pan above Flynn's head, ready to strike.

text: "Rapunzel, worried, grips pan, looks right."
original_texts: Rapunzel, with long blonde hair, is looking down with concern, holding a frying pan.
Rapunzel glances to her right, still gripping the frying pan tightly.

text: "Pascal stares at a red face, turning orange."
original_texts: Pascal, the chameleon, stands on the floor looking up with wide eyes.
Pascal glances at a red chalk drawing of a fierce face on the floor.
Pascal changes color from green to yellow while looking at the drawing.
Pascal's color shifts to orange as he continues to stare at the drawing.

text: "Flynn lies unconscious. Rapunzel, concerned, presses a frying pan to his face."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor, face down, with his cheek against the ground.
Rapunzel's hand holding a frying pan moves into view, pressing the pan against Flynn's face.
Rapunzel leans over Flynn, looking concerned and holding the frying pan firmly.

text: "Rapunzel holds a frying pan near unconscious Flynn."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor with his cheek against the ground.
A frying pan is placed near Flynn Rider's head.
Rapunzel's hand is holding the frying pan near Flynn Rider.

text: "Rapunzel's expression shifts from surprised to thoughtful."
original_texts: Rapunzel is holding a frying pan, looking surprised and cautious.
Rapunzel's expression changes to a more thoughtful look as she lowers the frying pan slightly.
Rapunzel's eyes widen again, returning to a surprised expression.

text: "Flynn unconscious on floor."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor, his head resting on the ground.

text: "Rapunzel looks down, concerned."
original_texts: Rapunzel, with long blonde hair and wearing a purple dress, looks surprised and slightly worried as she gazes downward.

text: "Flynn's eyes snap open."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying on the floor, unconscious, with his face resting on the ground.
Flynn Rider's eyes suddenly open wide as he wakes up, appearing surprised.

text: "Rapunzel raises a pan, eyes shut."
original_texts: Rapunzel holds a frying pan, looking surprised and determined.
Rapunzel raises the frying pan above her head with her eyes closed.
Rapunzel opens one eye slightly, maintaining her grip on the frying pan.

text: "Rapunzel drags an unconscious Flynn with her hair into a wardrobe. He starts waking up, so she hurriedly closes the door. Nervously, she checks around, then peeks inside. Flynn's hand emerges, but she shoves it back, closes the door, and stands contemplating."
original_texts: Rapunzel cautiously approaches Flynn Rider, who is lying unconscious on the floor.
Rapunzel uses her long hair to drag Flynn across the floor.
Flynn starts to regain consciousness as Rapunzel continues to pull him.
Rapunzel manages to drag Flynn into a wardrobe.
Flynn is awkwardly positioned upside down inside the wardrobe.
Rapunzel closes the wardrobe door, leaving Flynn inside.
Rapunzel looks around nervously, checking if anyone saw her.
Rapunzel opens the wardrobe slightly to peek inside, checking on Flynn.
Flynn's hand reaches out from the wardrobe, causing Rapunzel to react.
Rapunzel pushes Flynn's hand back inside and closes the wardrobe again.
Rapunzel stands with her hands on her hips, contemplating her next move.

text: "Rapunzel approaches a wardrobe with a frying pan, barricades it with a chair, and checks inside. Seeing her reflection, she shifts from determined to surprised, then smiles confidently. She twirls the pan, appearing thoughtful and holds it on her hip, considering her next move."
original_texts: Rapunzel cautiously approaches a wardrobe in the tower with a frying pan in hand.
Rapunzel places a green chair against the wardrobe door as a barricade.
She peers into the wardrobe, holding the frying pan defensively.
Rapunzel looks at her reflection in a nearby mirror, appearing determined.
Her expression changes to surprise as she realizes something.
Rapunzel smiles with newfound confidence while holding the frying pan.
She twirls with the frying pan, looking pleased and playful.
Rapunzel examines the frying pan, appearing thoughtful.
She holds the frying pan confidently with one hand on her hip.
Her expression turns contemplative as she considers her next move.
Rapunzel touches her forehead, deep in thought, still holding the frying pan.
